g.text: Index Correlation: Same Row = Same Entity

div.p: Key Property: For any row i:

ul.li: entities[i] = Entity ID at row i
velocities[i] = Velocity component Iteration: Just loop 0..len(), access all arrays at same index.
Position = 8 bytes → 8 entities per cache line
SIMD Potential: Layout allows easy vectorization

div.p: Cache Line: 64 bytes Each column stored as contiguous Vec<T> — sequential memory access Row i components at: • positions[i] • velocities[i] No indirection, no sparse lookup
Memory Address Content ───────────────────────────── 0x1000..0x100B Entity[0..3] 0x100C..0x1017 (padding) 0x2000..0x2017 Position[0..2] (24 bytes total) 0x3000..0x3017 Velocity[0..2] (24 bytes total)
